response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience with deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud infrastructure, which aligns well with the required technologies. His current role involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, showing relevant hands-on experience with agentic workflows. However, his background lacks explicit mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent frameworks, which are key requirements. His education and open-source contributions demonstrate technical depth, but his GenAI-specific experience is less clear.
strengths: Proven full-stack expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud platforms (AWS), with recent AI-agent infrastructure experience
Strong engineering leadership demonstrated through Staff-level roles, mentorship, and open-source contributions
Demonstrated ability to design and build scalable systems (e.g., GISCollective, Optilyz pricing engine) with attention to performance
concerns: Limited direct experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent system frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI) in resume
GenAI-specific expertise is not explicitly highlighted; current AI work appears to focus on infrastructure rather than core GenAI models
No mention of LLM performance metrics, optimization techniques, or model evaluation pipelines

key_factors.factor: Exposure to GenAI-relevant technologies (TypeScript, cloud platforms)
Lack of explicit RAG/vector DB/multi-agent experience
